title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Bikanervala Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Bikanervala Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Bikanervala Advisory Limited in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!
